MENU.Name: Configure Defaults
MENU.Label: Configure Defaults
MENU.Title: Token Defaults Configuration
MENU.Hint: These Settings apply to all types of Actors. If an Actor type also has one of those settings specified, the specific one will be prioritized.

Confirm.Label: Reset Defaults
Confirm.Warning: This will remove all configured Token Defaults

TOKEN_CREATE.Name: Tokens
TOKEN_CREATE.Hint: Apply the Defaults to newly created Tokens.

ACTOR_CREATE.Name: Prototype Tokens
ACTOR_CREATE.Hint: Apply the Defaults to the Prototype Tokens of newly created Actors.

COMPENDIUM.Name: Compendium Actors
COMPENDIUM.Hint: Apply the Defaults to the Prototype Tokens of newly created Actors in compendiums. This only works if the Prototype Token Setting is enabled too.
